languages.text: Ricochet disables overpenetration, but reuses the same mechanics to calculate its chances and its damage. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration will affect ricochet the same way.

traits.locale_text: Ricochet disables overpenetration, but reuses the same mechanics to calculate its chances and its damage. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration will affect ricochet the same way.

languages.text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.
languages.original_text: Ricochet disables overpenetration, but reuses the same mechanics to calculate its chances and its damage. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration will affect ricochet the same way.

traits.locale_text: Although ricochet replaces overpenetration, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

Although ricochet replaces overpenetration, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

Although ricochet replaces overpenetration, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

languages.text: Хотя рикошет заменяет {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозное пробитие{/g}, величина наносимого урона и шанс его нанесения по-прежнему определяются правилами сквозного пробития. Таким образом, все модификаторы, применимые к сквозному пробитию, также применяются к рикошету.
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: Хотя рикошет заменяет {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозное пробитие{/g}, величина наносимого урона и шанс его нанесения по-прежнему определяются правилами сквозного пробития. Таким образом, все модификаторы, применимые к сквозному пробитию, также применяются к рикошету.

Хотя рикошет заменяет {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозное пробитие{/g}, величина наносимого урона и шанс его нанесения по-прежнему определяются правилами сквозного пробития. Таким образом, все модификаторы, применимые к сквозному пробитию, также применяются к рикошету.

languages.text: Aunque el rebote sustituya a la {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g}, la cantidad de daño infligida (así como la probabilidad de infligirla) se basan igualmente en las reglas de la sobrepenetración. Por lo tanto, todos los modificadores que se apliquen a la sobrepenetración se aplican también al rebote.
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: Aunque el rebote sustituya a la {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g}, la cantidad de daño infligida (así como la probabilidad de infligirla) se basan igualmente en las reglas de la sobrepenetración. Por lo tanto, todos los modificadores que se apliquen a la sobrepenetración se aplican también al rebote.

languages.text: Obwohl "Rückschlag" {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}Überdurchdringung{/g} ersetzt, basiert der verursachte Schaden und die Chance, ihn zu verursachen, auf den Regeln für "Überdurchdringung". Deshalb gelten alle Modifikatoren für "Überdurchdringung" auch für "Rückschlag".
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: Obwohl "Rückschlag" {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}Überdurchdringung{/g} ersetzt, basiert der verursachte Schaden und die Chance, ihn zu verursachen, auf den Regeln für "Überdurchdringung". Deshalb gelten alle Modifikatoren für "Überdurchdringung" auch für "Rückschlag".

languages.text: Mermi sekmesi, {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} özelliğinin yerini alsa da hasar verme olasılığı ve verilen hasarın miktarı hâlen delip geçme kurallarına tabidir. Bu nedenle delip geçmeye uygulanan tüm değiştiriciler, mermi sekmesine de uygulanır.
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: Mermi sekmesi, {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} özelliğinin yerini alsa da hasar verme olasılığı ve verilen hasarın miktarı hâlen delip geçme kurallarına tabidir. Bu nedenle delip geçmeye uygulanan tüm değiştiriciler, mermi sekmesine de uygulanır.

languages.text: Bien que l'effet de ricochet remplace la {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g}, le montant de dégâts infligés et les chances de toucher restent régis par les règles afférentes à la surpénétration. Par conséquent, tous les modificateurs qui s'appliquent à la surpénétration sont également valables pour l'effet de ricochet.
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: Bien que l'effet de ricochet remplace la {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g}, le montant de dégâts infligés et les chances de toucher restent régis par les règles afférentes à la surpénétration. Par conséquent, tous les modificateurs qui s'appliquent à la surpénétration sont également valables pour l'effet de ricochet.

languages.text: 尽管{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}过度穿透{/g}被跳弹所取代，但跳弹造成的伤害量以及触发几率仍遵从过度穿透的规则。因此，所有适用于过度穿透的修正也同样适用于跳弹。
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: 尽管{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}过度穿透{/g}被跳弹所取代，但跳弹造成的伤害量以及触发几率仍遵从过度穿透的规则。因此，所有适用于过度穿透的修正也同样适用于跳弹。

languages.text: リバウンドは{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}貫通ダメージ{/g}を置き換えるが、ダメージ量やダメージを与える確率は貫通ダメージのルールに従う。したがって、貫通ダメージに適用されるすべての修正もリバウンドに適用される。
languages.original_text: Although ricochet replaces {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g}, the amount of damage dealt and the chance to deal it are still governed by the rules for overpenetration. Therefore, all modifiers that apply to overpenetration also apply to ricochet.

traits.locale_text: リバウンドは{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}貫通ダメージ{/g}を置き換えるが、ダメージ量やダメージを与える確率は貫通ダメージのルールに従う。したがって、貫通ダメージに適用されるすべての修正もリバウンドに適用される。
